{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/19336661?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/sm1ee", "id": 19336661, "login": "sm1ee", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE5MzM2NjYx", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/sm1ee", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-59209", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}], "description": "## Impact
An authenticated member with use-only editor access to a shared workflow could read credential-populated headers exposed via the `$request` object inside an HTTP Request node's pagination expression. When an HTTP Header Auth credential is applied to a paginated request, the secret is present in `$request.headers` when pagination expressions are evaluated. A user-controlled expression could read that secret, copy it into item data, and exfiltrate it through a later HTTP Request node, bypassing credential domain restrictions, since the secret leaves via item data rather than the credential's own request mechanism.

This issue only affects instances with `N8N_EXPRESSION_ENGINE=vm` set, where paginated HTTP Request workflows using shared credentials are accessible to non-owner users.

## Patches
The issue has been fixed in n8n versions 1.123.61, 2.27.4, and 2.28.1. Users should upgrade to one of these versions or later to remediate the vulnerability.

## Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, administrators should consider the following temporary mitigations:
- Restrict workflow sharing to fully trusted users only.
- Avoid sharing credentials with use-only access to untrusted users on workflows that use HTTP Request nodes with pagination enabled.

These workarounds do not fully remediate the risk and should only be used as short-term mitigation measures.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00294, "percentile": 0.21574}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q3j5-8vrg-4p9q", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T21:54:53Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q3j5-8vrg-4p9q", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q3j5-8vrg-4p9q"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-59209"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-07-09T17:17:01Z", "published_at": "2026-07-22T21:54:53Z", "references": ["https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/security/advisories/GHSA-q3j5-8vrg-4p9q", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-59209", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n%402.27.4", "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/releases/tag/n8n%402.28.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q3j5-8vrg-4p9q"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/n8n-io/n8n/security-advisories/GHSA-q3j5-8vrg-4p9q", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n", "summary": "n8n: Shared Credential Header Leak via HTTP Request Pagination Expression", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T21:54:54Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q3j5-8vrg-4p9q", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.123.61", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.123.61"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.28.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.28.0, < 2.28.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.27.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "n8n"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.0-rc.0, < 2.27.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: n8n: Shared Credential Header Leak via HTTP Request Pagination Expression
